new_terms.context: The decoupling between unit shipments and silicon value tells the real story of Apple’s foundry economics.
The decoupling between unit shipments and silicon value...
...yet A-series wafer value has nearly tripled over the same period.
iPhone accounted for 74% of Apple’s monthly wafer consumption that year.
TSMC now serves five Apple product lines at scale, reducing revenue volatility tied to iPhone cycles.
Mac silicon, nonexistent before M1, now represents 12% of the mix.
